body: Hi Sandra, your 2018 Malibu is ready for pickup. We're open till 5:30 today. - Hari's Auto Body
Anthony, quick update: Kia Sorento supplement approved by Progressive. Should have it done by end of week. - Hari's Auto Body
Reminder: Your vehicle (2022 Subaru Outback) estimate appointment is tomorrow at 10am. - Hari's Auto Body

Parts for your Altima just shipped. ETA next week. We'll call when they arrive. - Hari's Auto Body
Hey is my car going to be done by Friday? Need it for a trip. - Tom
Tom, yes should be done Thursday afternoon. We'll text you when it's ready. - Hari
Hi Patricia, your RAV4 is all set. Final balance has been covered by State Farm. - Hari's Auto Body
Dan, need pricing on 5 gal Envirobase HP Pearl White. Got a job coming in. Thanks - Hari
Hari, Pearl White HP is $389/gal or $1750 for 5gal with the fall promo. Want me to put an order in? - Dan K (PPG)
